code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut token = ""
    mut idx = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i <= n
      mut is_ws = false
      if i == n
        is_ws = true
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            is_ws = true
          end
        when None
          is_ws = true
        end
      end
      if is_ws
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          if idx % 2 == 0
            if first
              result = token
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{token}"
            end
          end
          idx = idx + 1
          token = ""
        end
      else
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        when None
          token = token
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
